home.name: Francy Santos
home.bio:
I am a Fullstack Developer specializing in Serverless architectures, with a full focus on the Cloudflare ecosystem (Workers, D1, KV, R2). My passion is building ultra-performance applications, blending the technical rigor of distributed systems with the aesthetic sensibility of UI/UX Design.

On the frontend, I use TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Tailwind to create intuitive and responsive interfaces. On the backend, I master Hono.js for Edge Computing environments, alongside solid experience with Node.js. I also know a bit of Golang and I am learning Rust. This versatility allows me to choose the ideal tool for each scenario, from lightweight edge functions to complex, optimized systems.

I believe code should be organized, clean, and scalable. Whether creating architectures from scratch or optimizing existing systems, my goal is to deliver exceptional performance and global availability, ensuring that technology is the engine that drives an impeccable user experience.
